testcase.name: test_viewer_can_delete_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_delete_and_ui_fixes.py:212: in test_viewer_can_delete_ticket assert ticket_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create ticket: {ticket_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create ticket: {"detail":"Invalid or expired session"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_delete_other_viewer_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_delete_and_ui_fixes.py:248: in test_cannot_delete_other_viewer_ticket assert response.status_code == 404 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
